title: Ragsall
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image= |name=Ragsall
"Rags" |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[Bravo Flight (New Republic)|Bravo Flight]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Ragsall''', also known as '''Rags''', was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and one of the pilots who flew cover for the ''[[Tampion]]'' before it was captured by the [[Yevetha]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1stm}} *[[Tyrant's Test (abridged audiobook)|''Tyrant's Test'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:New Republic Starfighter Corps personnel]]
